title: Assigned people to items and sub items on the creation of a project board from a template
excerpt:

posts.author: Detaman (Dan Taman)
posts.cookedHtml:
When creating a new project board from a template, we’d like an automation that will assign the creator of the project board to certain items and sub items.

Of course you can save the template with predetermined people assigned. but when using a shared template we need to be able to assign a job function such as product manager to specific items and sub items.

for our use case, the product manager will always be the board creator so to able to have the board creator (PM) be assigned at the creation of the board would be great!
